title: Install Azure preconfigured dashboards and alerts

blocks.content:
In this milestone, you'll install preconfigured dashboards and alerts that display the Azure metrics collected by Cloud Provider Observability. Cloud Provider Observability offers pre-built dashboards and alerts optimized for Azure services, along with powerful exploration tools to investigate performance patterns and identify potential issues.

Cloud Provider Observability can deploy dashboards and alerts for many Azure services you're monitoring, providing immediate insights into resource utilization, performance trends, and operational health.
In Grafana Cloud, click **Observability > Cloud provider > Azure** in the main menu.
Scroll down to the **Dashboards and Alerts Installation** section.
Click **Install** to install pre-built dashboards and alert rules for discovered Azure services.

Preconfigured dashboards are available for services including Azure Application Gateway, Azure Blob Storage, Azure SQL Database, Azure Virtual Machines, Azure Virtual Network, and more.

Preconfigured alerts help you detect issues such as high CPU usage, connection failures, and storage capacity problems across your Azure environment.

For the full list of preconfigured dashboards and alerts, refer to [Preconfigured dashboards and alerts for Azure metrics](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/monitor-infrastructure/monitor-cloud-provider/azure/azure-alerts/).
